texto: She wanted to kiss him.No.It was one thing to return his kiss
autor: she’d been prepared for that. But it was another thing entirely to want his kiss… another thing entirely to desire his affections.
explicacao: Citação de she’d been prepared for that. But it was another thing entirely to want his kiss… another thing entirely to desire his affections. sobre temas ligados a amor. “She wanted to kiss him.No.It was one thing to return his kiss” articula amor, renee-ahdieh, the-wrath-and-the-dawn em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como the-wrath-and-the-dawn.
